title: I Found Something Important
overview: Ann, Ines and Lene are three Shinki with a problem: after helping their master move back to his home to start high school, they find a box labeled "Important". Everything is going well, until they somehow accidentally pierce the box with a knife...

title: The Secret Ingredient Is the Scent of Gunpowder
overview: Hina, a Strarf-type "battle" shinki, becomes concerned that her master is not much of a battler. Meanwhile, Ann and the other shinki begin preparing a feast for the master's entrance gift.

title: Crash! Battle Trike
overview: A shinki thief is on the loose, so Kurara asks for Ann's help to catch him. The master is taken in for questioning, and it's up to his Shinki to clear his name.

title: It's a Race! Once Around the Park
overview: Lene and Ines are on the outs, and their Master has the itch to travel. A race aorund the park promises a trip to Okinawa for the winning Shinki and their Master, and Ines along with Lene enter...as well as few surprise entrants too.

title: Beach Swimsuit Armor
overview: Ann and the rest of the Shinki prepare for a trip to Okinawa with their Master...who unfortunately leaves them behind while running late. The girls then decide to make their way to the small island in search of fun and sun.

title: Attention, Please! Our Plane Is Bound to Hell!
overview: While on a return trip from Okinawa, the Ann and Co. encounter a trio of Shinkis who have hijacked the plane and are sending it on a one way trip to hell.

title: The Visitor Comes With the Sound of Rain
overview: As the weather suddenly shifts to a downpour, the Shinkis go out searching for their master and encounter something not of this world...or so they think.

title: Someday, Somewhere
overview: One day, Ann wakes up as a human. When Rihito sees her pouting in the park, he decides to do the gentlemanly thing and help her out. Meanwhile, Ann’s Shinki body has been infected by a potentially fatal virus!

title: Lene's Underground Wars of the Empire
overview: The evil Shinki Cloudy rules the underground empire that is home to rogue Shinki. Lene swears that she will help the Liberation Army fight for freedom... while searching for her master’s missing rice ball.

title: A Christmas Song for You
overview: Christmas time is finally here, and the Shinki's decide to get part time jobs so they can buy their Master some wonderful presents.

title: We'll Settle It Tonight! Who Is the Strongest Shinki?!
overview: Hina has been acting strange lately. The time to send her back to her Maker is close at hand, and the others think this may be why she's not herself lately. If it's true, then a battle must commence to decide who is the strongest before she departs!

title: Don't Say Goodbye
overview: The Shinkis are scrambling to get to Hina, who is about to go back to her Maker. They must find her before it's too late, or they may never see her again.
